subject: Swift-BAT trigger 419015 is not astrophysical
body:
S.D. Barthelmy (GSFC) on behalf of the BAT Team reports:

With the full data set now downlinked, the Swift-BAT trigger 419015 
at 10/04/10 07:27:40 UT (GCN Circ 10578) is not a GRB nor anything astrophysical.
It is a chance coincidence of noise in the rate and image domains
while Swift was entering the SAA.
